subcodes.first_line: O esteemed and erudite one! I have perused thy noble letter and apprehended the mysteries of thy lucid discourse, and I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها النحریر الجلیل قد اطلعت بکتابک الکریم و وقفت باسرار خطابک المبین و اننی
subcodes.subjects: @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @multiple meanings; interpretations in scripture, @nature and God's will
